metadata.purpose: Proposition -> evidence join table. The existing infrastructure is evidence-side (literature/, derivation.qmd, verification/cache); this file records, per manuscript proposition, WHICH evidence backs it, making the gate checkable per-proposition. Populated during the Level-3 decomposition and maintained during every section review.

evidence_classes.lit: literature/<citekey>.md - read-in-session rule applies before status may reach 'verified'
evidence_classes.verif: committed artifact under verification/ (cache RDS/CSV, scripts, run logs)
evidence_classes.xmodel: cross-model audit record (GPT-5.5 runs, blind re-derivation gradings)

metadata.status_ladder: proposed -> queued -> acquired -> verified -> cited (lit class; mirrors todo/003). deriv/verif/xmodel entries are 'verified' once the pointer resolves and the content was checked against the claim.

schema_example.passage_or_value: Optional: the specific passage, equation, or cached number relied on.
schema_example.note: What this entry establishes for the proposition, and any caveat.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Abstract: ML and Bayesian MI 'currently represent the state of the art.'
20th-anniversary update framing; catalogs settled landscape (mechanisms, FIML, Bayes, MI, MNAR, multilevel).
The MI program: impute m times, analyze, combine.
SS5 :404: 'the connected AIC method seems worthwhile to be further investigated, both theoretically as well as in practical situations. This, however, extends the scope of the current paper.'
evidence_map.note: Prior MI-AIC's own open-theory statement; quote used in P2.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: SS1 :54 'surprisingly sparse'; SS2.1 :123 averaged criteria 'not supported by MI literature' (citing White et al. 2011 p.389).
Abstract :24: 'there are currently no guidelines for variable selection in multiply imputed data sets.'
Ch.5: D1/D2/D3 testing + Wald-based stepwise + LASSO variants; no IC-after-MI treatment.
MI-inference section covers Wald/LRT pooling + SEM fit only.
M1 typing pass section (2026-06-06): centering question + replication principle confirmed unposed across the theory line.
evidence_map.note: Backs the asserted-here typing of the principle.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: SS4 :279: 'A good method should have type 1 error close to that observed using the full data.'
evidence_map.note: The precedented benchmark practice the novelty claim is scoped against.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Table 7: AIC_orig 0.731/0.722 vs MI methods 0.540-0.594.
evidence_map.note: Displays the replication gap without framing it - second precedent for the benchmark practice.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: MI-IC companion paper (Waldman, in preparation): complete-data replication framing at MI-IC/manuscript/mi-ic-article.qmd:136.
evidence_map.note: PLACEHOLDER for the @TODO:mi-ic-companion citation in S1-P3 prose - the companion needs a citable form (preprint/DOI or in-prep bib entry) before compile. Logged in todo/003.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: +1/2 tr(RIV) + (A)+(C) and the +tr/-1/2tr decomposition.
(A)+(C): O(1), MCAR vanishing.
Model-specific bias; corrected criterion; noncentral shrinkage factors.
Null-side rungs 2-3: 0.904/0.903 vs oracle 0.899 (exact values quoted in S4, qualitative here).
Calibrated reference absorbs the null mean (eq. 1.10 spectrum).
evidence_map.note: Testing side of the null-replication claim.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: :77-89: AIC_{x;y} penalty d + tr(I_x I_y^{-1}); 'The additional penalty is only half the value of that in PDIO'; SS8 names mechanism combinations as future work.
AICcd = -2Q + 2tr(I_x I_y^{-1}); complete-data discrepancy motivation.
TIC-style criterion on the EM Q-function for missing covariates ('best approximating' values; no correct-specification assumption).
Weighted (Horvitz-Thompson) AIC for incomplete/design-based samples.
evidence_map.note: Reweighting route; leaves imputation-based criterion open.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Covariate-shift weighting of the log-likelihood.
Congeniality definition and the uncongenial controversy.

acquisition_queue_note: New references surfaced while drafting enter here as 'proposed' AND in todo/003 in the same response (standing rule). The /status dashboard reports the backlog by status.

metrics_gate.notes: Partial evaluation at S1 drafting (2026-06-06): every S1 paragraph proposition has >=1 entry; all pointers resolve; the one 'proposed' entry (E-S1-P3-4) is the declared @TODO:mi-ic-companion placeholder. Full gate when all sections drafted.
